title: CR-098 Direct Submodule Edit: SDLC Governance Bypass During INV-013 CAPA Execution

comment:
REVIEW: INV-014 v0.1 -- COMPLIANT. All review criteria verified with evidence.

FRONTMATTER: title = "CR-098 Direct Submodule Edit: SDLC Governance Bypass During INV-013 CAPA Execution" (present, non-empty). revision_summary = "Initial draft" (appropriate for v0.1; no CR ID required per SOP-001 Section 5.1 and SOP-002 Section 8).

STRUCTURE: All 10 sections required by SOP-003 Section 5 are present: Purpose, Scope (Context, Deviation Type, Systems/Docs Affected), Background (Expected, Actual, Discovery, Timeline), Description of Deviations (Facts, Evidence), Impact Assessment (Systems, Documents, Other), Root Cause Analysis (Contributing Factors, Root Causes), Remediation Plan (4 CAPAs), Execution Comments, Execution Summary, References.

PLACEHOLDER CONTENT: None found in pre-approved content (Sections 1-6). Execution-phase placeholders in Sections 7-10 are expected per template convention.

TRACEABILITY: All referenced documents verified -- INV-012 (CLOSED v2.0), INV-013 (CLOSED v2.0), CR-098 (CLOSED v2.0), SOP-001 (EFFECTIVE), SOP-002 (EFFECTIVE), SOP-003 (EFFECTIVE), SOP-005 (EFFECTIVE). All claimed states match actual QMS states.

EVIDENCE VERIFICATION: (1) Deny rules at settings.local.json lines 86-87 confirmed as "Edit(pipe-dream/qms-cli/**)" and "Write(pipe-dream/qms-cli/**)" -- double-nested path confirmed. QMS deny rules at lines 82-85 use correct patterns without project prefix. No flow-state deny rules exist. (2) SOP-005 Section 7.1.1 line 139 confirmed: no development location specified. Section 7.1.3 confirmed: merge prerequisites and type specified but not method (PR). "Used for" list confirmed: says "code" without explicit template/config/docs mention. (3) TEMPLATE-CR line 104 confirmed: "Seed copy: commit in qms-cli submodule, update submodule pointer" with no SOP-005 reference. Lines 205, 273 confirmed: vague "or other" language present. (4) SOP-002 Section 7.3 confirmed: no PR verification bullet in QA post-review checklist.

DEVIATIONS: Five deviations identified, each with specific evidence. All five are well-documented with exact line references, quoted text, and comparison tables.

ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS: Eight contributing factors identified, distilled into primary root cause (multiple defense layers absent/misconfigured/vague) and contributing root cause (no reliable agent trigger for SDLC-governed changes). Analysis connects to INV-012 and explains why prior CAPAs were insufficient.

CAPAs: Four CAPAs proposed covering all five deviations. CAPA-001 (corrective: fix deny rules) and CAPA-002 (corrective: retroactive test verification) are direct INV execution. CAPA-003 (preventive: SOP-005 + SOP-002 updates) and CAPA-004 (preventive: TEMPLATE-CR updates) are bundled into a child CR. Execution ordering is specified in the comment block and is logical.

REFERENCES: SOP-001 and SOP-003 present (minimum required per SOP-003 Section 5.10). Triggering documents (INV-012, INV-013, CR-098, CR-099) present. Additional relevant references (SOP-002, SOP-005, TEMPLATE-CR) included.

FORMATTING: Consistent heading hierarchy, table formatting, and code block usage throughout. No typos or grammatical errors found.

FINDING: No deficiencies identified. Recommend for approval.
